comment.body:
I think the shorts have long since covered 
However many institutions and HF have deleveraged particularly their USA allocations 
Additionally Vol control funds and CTAs are under allocated as well 
Yet another source of buying pressure will come from MM as volatility drops and customers puts / hedges lose delta 
So a lot of the buying we see might “look like” short covering but it’s actually flow from a number of different market participants
